frame_transform_derivation: setpoint.v_body[2] is body-z positive down; world-up commanded reference is v_ref_up = -v_body_z * cos(level_pitch) * cos(level_roll). For A091 level_pitch=-0.3106987661062333 and level_roll=0.00025650874109527094, cos_tilt=0.952120141444416.

grid.iteration_order: L outer, tau middle, g inner; strict less-than, first wins

measured_response_field: v_full_raw_mps reconstructed as -Theil-Sen(d e_meas/dt) over certified FULL_QUAD history_before 0.50s, matching the checkpoint semantic/runtime twin rate_anchor_v_raw; row timestamps are feature_ts_ns and exposure alignment to command ticks uses mono_ns nearest tick <= one dt.
reg2_note: REG-2 is not written by this artifact; numeric binding is intentionally left to the follow-up criterion commit.
zero_none_law: 0.0 is retained as an observed value; None/absent fields are OFF_SUPPORT/ABSENT_INPUT and are never merged with zero.
